reference_answer: Temporary key TK-31 became effective on 2026-12-14 at 06:00.
TK-31's active interval ended on 2026-12-18 at 20:00.
During the active interval, TK-31's status was approved only for escorted archive-room scanning.
After the active interval ended, TK-31's status changed to disabled.
The renewal packet was due by 2026-12-17 at 09:00.
